title: codiaeum hirsutum
intro: Codiaeum hirsutum, also known as the Croton or Naga Keriting, is a species of flowering plant native to Malaysia and Indonesia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The health benefits of Codiaeum hirsutum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Codiaeum hirsutum plant are often used in teas, infusions, or as a topical application for its medicinal properties.
